story.description: A clip of Earth, atmosphere, clouds, storms, or landscapes seen from above: aerial view of fluffy clouds from airplane
story.hook: Storm clouds show where a storm is feeding
story.lead: fluffy clouds from above hide a storm’s signal: they’re not soft at all. See those towering towers that punch straight up? That’s where water gets pushed so high it freezes into ice. The storm only starts when those icy tops spread like a fan because the rising air can’t go any higher. Watch this one twice.
